title: Krieg Tightens His Grip on the Baratie
description: On pages 21–24, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's proof of my invincible strength!

dialogue.speaker: Pearl
dialogue.text: That's why they call me Krieg Pirates! "Iron Shield Pearl!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: has got quite the fashion sense.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You'll get hurt if you look away in a fight!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Alright, that's enough talk from you.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'd like to see you try to fight me without getting hurt!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I can even withstand a direct blast from a battleship cannon!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No matter the attack, I'm imperetrable!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Glad I didn't fall into the ocean.

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
